content: لاَزِم أَوَدّي الحَاجَات النَّهَارِدَة عَلَشان السَّبت دَه يَوْم غَسيل
translations: eng:We need to take the stuff away today because this saturday is laundry day

transcriptions.arabizi: laezim 'awaddiilhagaet ilnahardah Aalashaen ilsabtadah yoom ghaseel
